recommendations.title: Felon
recommendations.overview: A family man convicted of killing an intruder must cope with life afterward in the violent penal system.

recommendations.title: Shot Caller
recommendations.overview: A newly-released prison gangster is forced by the leaders of his gang to orchestrate a major crime with a brutal rival gang on the streets of Southern California.

recommendations.title: Greenland 2: Migration
recommendations.overview: Having found the safety of the Greenland bunker after the comet Clarke decimated the Earth, the Garrity family must now risk everything to embark on a perilous journey across the wasteland of Europe to find a new home.

recommendations.title: Angel Has Fallen
recommendations.overview: After a treacherous attack, Secret Service agent Mike Banning is charged with attempting to assassinate President Trumbull. Chased by his own colleagues and the FBI, Banning begins a race against the clock to clear his name.

recommendations.title: Greenland
recommendations.overview: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting levelled, the Garritys experience the best and worst in hum

recommendations.title: Kandahar
recommendations.overview: After his mission is exposed, an undercover CIA operative stuck deep in hostile territory in Afghanistan must fight his way out, alongside his Afghan translator, to an extraction point in Kandahar, all whilst avoiding elite enemy forces and foreign s

recommendations.title: The Equalizer
recommendations.overview: McCall believes he has put his mysterious past behind him and dedicated himself to beginning a new, quiet life. But when he meets Teri, a young girl under the control of ultra-violent Russian gangsters, he can’t stand idly by – he has to help her. Ar

recommendations.title: Amores Perros
recommendations.overview: A fatalistic car crash in Mexico city sets off a chain of events in the lives of three people: a supermodel, a young man wanting to run off with his sister-in-law, and a homeless man.

recommendations.title: The Hunger Games
recommendations.overview: In a dystopian society where the Capitol forces each district to send two young tributes to fight to the death in a televised spectacle, a girl volunteers to take her sister’s place, setting the stage for a struggle of survival and defiance.

recommendations.title: The Unforgivable
recommendations.overview: A woman is released from prison after serving a sentence for a violent crime and re-enters a society that refuses to forgive her past.
